title: fraxinus sogdiana
intro: Fraxinus sogdiana, also known as the Sogdian ash or Manchurian ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This deciduous tree is native to East Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The bark and leaves of the Fraxinus sogdiana plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and to promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Fraxinus sogdiana, including infusions and decoctions, are often used to support respiratory health and reduce inflammation.
